use_cases: Display time-based activity patterns across days and hours
Visualize intensity of recurring events or behaviors over a grid
Show usage or engagement metrics with color-coded intensity values
ai_summary: A Reaviz-based heat map component for visualizing time-series intensity data across a grid. Displays activity patterns with color gradients indicating value intensity, with automatic dark mode detection based on system preferences. Ideal for showing recurring data patterns like user engagement or system activity over time.
